choices.text: Accelerometer (linear accel) + gyroscope (angular velocity) + magnetometer (compass). Integration over time gives velocity + position (drift accumulates). Sensor fusion with vision (VIO) reduces drift.

Sensor fusion: camera + IMU + LiDAR + wheel encoders combined via Kalman/Extended Kalman/Particle filter. Single sensor fails (GPS no signal indoors); combined gives robust estimate of pose. Standard SLAM stack.
